Android Development

Boilerplates and templates for Android

  • Android Bootstrap A template/bootstrap/boilerplate application that includes tons of great open source tools and frameworks.
  • Android Material Drawer Templatestars686 An Android template with navigation drawer for material design.
  • material-design-icons-adt-templatestars440 Android Studio / Eclipse ADT template for material-design-icons resources.
  • AndroidKickststarterstars611 Framework kickstarts development which help you focus on coding.
  • Android Annotationsstars11.1k Fast Android Development. Easy maintainance.
  • Android Cookbook Examplesstars936 Collected code examples from the O'Reilly Android Cookbook.
  • Android Basic Samplesstars934 Mostly game oriented samples.
  • Android Webview Sample Appstars64 Webview Sample App
  • Android Quickstartstars233 Quickstart application showing the Google Drive API for Android.
  • Beginning Android Resources Android Guide.
  • Universal Music Playerstars12.1k Google sample application that shows how to implement an audio media app that works across multiple form factors and provides a consistent user experience on Android phones, tablets, Auto, Wear and Cast devices.
  • Android Architecture Blueprintsstars38.7k Demonstrates a basic Model-View-Presenter architecture and showcases various TODO app implementations.

IOS Development.

Boilerplates and templates for IOS

  • iOS Boilerplatestars2.8k Boilerplate by Gimeno.
  • Amarostars387 Featureful iOS Boilerplate.
  • Boilerplate-iOSstars7 Boilerplate by openaphid.

JavaScript

Boilerplates and templates for JavaScript

  • Yeoman The web's scaffolding tool for modern webapps. Includes many generators to get started.
  • Mega Boilerplatestars3.8k Fullstack boilerplate generator with support for Node.js, a static site, or an Electron app.
  • NodeJS
    • Yeoman Node Generatorstars553 Yeomans node generator
    • Node Module boilerplatestars671 Boilerplate to kickstart creating a node module
    • Express Boilerplatestars1.6k Boilerplate generator for Express.js Projects
    • Hackathon Starterstars31.8k A boilerplate for Node.js web applications.
    • Node/Backbone Web App Boilerplatestars25 Boilerplate for web applications with a Node, Express, MongoDB backend and Backbone Marionette, Jade, Require.js frontend.
    • Nodebootstrap Unobtrusive skeleton project for Node/Express.js with pre-configured best-practices.
    • Vue-Express-Mongo Boilerplatestars2.8k - Full stack JS web app boilerplate with Express, Mongo and VueJS.
  • AngularJS
    • ng-boilerplatestars4k An opinionated kickstarter for AngularJS projects.
    • Yeoman Angular Generatorstars5.8k
    • Angular Laravel CouchDBstars8 Angular Laravel CouchDB Boilerplate
  • ReactJS
    • React Boilerplatestars555 Boilerplate for creating a React npm package
    • React Boilerplate React boilerplate with React Router and webpack
    • React Transform Boilerplatestars3.4k A new Webpack boilerplate with hot reloading React components, and error handling on module and component level.
    • Library Boilerplatestars390 An opinionated boilerplate for React libraries including ESLint, Mocha, Babel, Webpack and an example powered by Webpack Dev Server and React Hot Loader
    • React NPM Component Starterstars165 A minimal boilerplate for building a React component for NPM
    • React Isomorphic Starterkitstars2.3k Isomorphic starterkit with server-side React rendering having many features
    • Coffee React Quickstart stars254 Quickstart for building React single page apps using Coffeescript, Gulp, Webpack, and React-Router
    • Flask React Boilerplatestars367 Flask and react Boilerplate
    • Boilerplate Webpack Reactstars45 Boilerplate project for Reactjs with webpack, gulp and stylus
    • React JS Hot loader Boilerplates React hot loader starter kits
    • React Redux minimalstars797 A minimal React-Redux boilerplate with all the best practices
    • React Redux Universal Hot Examplestars12k A starter boilerplate for a universal webapp using express, react, redux, webpack, and react-transform
    • post3ree-boilerplatestars12 Boilerplate for a universal application using 3REE stack (React, Redux, RethinkDB, Express) + PostCSS
  • HyperApp
    • hyperapp-boilerplatestars45 Boilerplate showing how to create a production-ready Hyperapp application.
  • Backbone
    • Backbone Boilerplatesstars493 Backbone Boilerplates by Addy Osmani.
    • Yeoman Backbone Generatorstars648 Yeoman generator for Backbone.
    • benmstars173 Boilerplate web app using Backbone.js, ExpressJS, node.js, MongoDB.
  • Jquery
    • Generator Jquery Boilerplatestars153 Yeoman Generator for jQuery Boilerplate.
  • Polymer
    • Polymer Starter Kitstars2.5k A starting point for Polymer 1.0 apps.
    • Polymer Seed Elementstars278 An element providing a starting point for your own reusable Polymer elements.
    • Yeoman Polymer Generatorstars939 Yeoman's polymer Generator
  • Electron
    • Electron Boilerplatestars1.5k Boilerplate for electron-node
    • WhiteStormJS - React/Redux - three.js - TypeScript boilerplatestars286 A starter kit for crafting 3D applications using modern technologies

Hybrid Mobile App Frameworks

  • Angular Gulp Ionic Boilerplatestars76 Ionic framework boilerplate for writing apps using Gulp and EcmaScript6.

Python

Boilerplates and templates for Python

  • Django Hackathon Starterstars1.5k A boilerplate for Django web applications, providing various social logins and several popular API examples.
  • CookieCutterstars14.4k List of various python templates by Audrey.
  • bootstrapystars287 A bootstrap Python application, so that you can focus on writing code.
  • Fbonestars1.6k Fbone (Flask bone) is a Flask (Python microframework) template/bootstrap/boilerplate application.
  • hasura/hello-python-flask A boilerplate Flask application which can be deployed in 3 mins, with ready-to-use database, authentication and file APIs.
  • Flask-Bootstrapstars197 A Flask app template with integrated SQLAlchemy, authentication, and Bootstrap frontend.
  • Flask Boilerplatestars8 A very simple flask boilerplate with folder structures.
  • Flask Foundationstars1.2k App built with best practices.
  • GoogleAppEngine Webapp2 Boilerplatestars690 A Complete boilerplate for Python Webapp2 on Google App Engine
  • Flask Appengine Templatestars1.1k Flask App engine Template
  • Django Starter Templatestars139 An easy to use project template for Django that follows best practices.
  • gae-init Google App Engine based on Flask, RESTful, Bootstrap and tons of other cool features.
  • CherryPy + Mako + Formish + OOOP boilerplatestars5 Targets publishing of OpenERP content to the web.

PHP

Boilerplates and templates for PHP

  • Laravel Angular CouchDBstars8 Laravel Angular CouchDB Boilerplate

Ruby

Boilerplates and templates for Ruby

  • AngularJS Rails Templatesstars574 Rails and Angular Tempate.
  • AngularJS Sinatra Bootstrap Angular Sinatra Bootstrap template.
  • Rails Composer Use Rails Composer to generate any of the example applications from the RailsApps project.
  • Rails Bootstrapstars533 Starter App for Rails and Bootstrap

.NET

Boilerplates and templates for C#.NET and ASP.NET

  • ASP.NET Boilerplatestars9.5k ASP.NET Boilerplate is a starting point for new modern web applications using best practices and most popular tools.

Go

Boilerplates and templates for Go

  • Go React JSX Boilerplatestars1 Starter code for a React + Go web application

Browser Webextensions

Boilerplates and templates to develop webextensions for internet browsers such as Chrome, Firefox and Safari

  • Boilerplate with Webpackstars28 Using Webpack JS module manager

Websites

Boilerplates and templates for Websites

  • HTML5 Boilerplate Web's most popular front-end template
  • Meteor boilerplatestars893 Boilerplate for meteor framework.
  • Web Starter Kitstars18.5k Web starter kit by Google.
  • Open Designs Open Source WebDesign Templates
  • Open Web Design Community of designers and site owners sharing free web design templates
  • OSWD Platform for sharing standards-compliant free web design templates
  • Jekyll Starter Kitstars139 Jekyll Progressive Web App generator boilerplate.
  • HTML5 UP! Responsive HTML5 and CSS3 Site Templates.
  • Gulp front Frontend boilerplate and framework based on gulp, pug, stylus and babel

IDE

Templating Systems for Different IDE's

  • Yasnippetstars2.3k A template system for Emacs.
  • Vim Templatestars332 Simple Vim Templates plugin.

GitHub

Boilerplates and template files

  • GitHub Template Guidelinesstars143 Collection of guidelines and boilerplate files for writing maintanable GitHub projects.
  • Pollinatestars214 Template your base files and generate them from GitHub.

Contributing

Your contributions are always welcome!
